## Freed v26.3.103

RSS feed persistence, platform capability honesty, desktop UI polish

### Fixes

- RSS feed persistence, platform capability honesty, desktop UI polish
- Fix tab strip alignment in AddFeedDialog
- Fix hero vertical centering and desktop text alignment

### Downloads

**macOS:** `.dmg` (Apple Silicon or Intel, signed + notarized)  
**Windows:** `.exe` (NSIS installer)  
**Linux:** `.AppImage`  

> macOS downloads are signed and notarized for normal Gatekeeper installation.
